name: KORN FERRY
summary: Korn Ferry is a global consulting firm offering talent and organizational performance solutions. It provides executive search, professional recruiting, RPO, leadership development, organizational consulting, and digital talent products. Its Korn Ferry Talent Suite includes products like Architect, Assess, Pay, Recruit, and Sell. In fiscal 2025, the company generated $2,730.1 million in fee revenue, serving clients across 51 countries through 103 offices.
